# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
  labels:
    app: microservice-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-a-container
        image: your-image-repo/microservice-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
  labels:
    app: microservice-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-b-container
        image: your-image-repo/microservice-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-c
  labels:
    app: microservice-c
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-c-container
        image: your-image-repo/microservice-c:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8082
